what: Attempt to fix authentication issues automatically
why: Some auth issues (expired tokens, missing configs) can be auto-repaired
output: Repair report indicating which auth issues were fixed and which remain

event.message: All authentication issues have been resolved automatically

error_handling.criteria: Self-heal attempted but one or more auth issues could not be resolved automatically
error_handling.action: Report to user with manual resolution instructions

event.message: Some authentication issues could not be fixed automatically — manual intervention required

decisions.outcome: Authentication check complete, proceed to next boot phase
Report to user with manual resolution instructions
